title: 1. Compound Optical Microscope Anatomy & Optics
desc: Labeled optical diagram of eyepiece, objective lenses, coarse/fine adjustment knobs, stage, and light mirror.

title: 2. Eukaryotic Plant Cell Structure
desc: High-resolution anatomical diagram of cellulose cell wall, plasma membrane, nucleus, central vacuole, chloroplasts, and mitochondria.

title: 3. Eukaryotic Animal Cell Structure
desc: Complete animal cell structure showing plasma membrane, central nucleus, mitochondria powerhouses, lysosomes, and centrioles.

title: 4. Onion Epidermal Cells Microscopic View
desc: Photomicrograph showing rectangular plant cells stained with Safranin, prominent cell walls, and nuclei.

title: 5. Human Cheek Cells Microscopic View
desc: Photomicrograph showing flat, irregular animal epithelial cells stained with Methylene Blue.

title: 6. Amoeba Proteus Anatomy & Pseudopodia
desc: Single-celled protozoan schematic illustrating false feet (pseudopodia), contractile vacuole, and nucleus.

title: 7. Paramecium Caudatum Cilia Anatomy
desc: Slipper-shaped protozoan diagram detailing surrounding cilia hair fringe, oral groove, and macronucleus.

title: 8. Prokaryotic Bacterium Cell Structure
desc: Detailed prokaryotic structure detailing capsule wall, cell membrane, circular plasmid DNA, and flagellum.

title: 9. Underground Biogas (Gobar Gas) Plant
desc: Engineering cross-section of anaerobic digester tank, slurry inlet, methane gas holder dome, and spent manure outlet.

title: 10. Oersted’s Compass Deflection Experiment
desc: Physics diagram showing compass needle deflection under a current-carrying wire demonstrating magnetic effect.

title: 11. Electromagnet & Soft Iron Core
desc: Diagram of insulated copper solenoid coil wrapped around soft iron core connected to a DC circuit.

title: 12. Solenoid Magnetic Field Loops (B)
desc: Magnetic field flux lines around a current-carrying cylindrical coil.

title: 13. Zinc-Carbon Dry Cell Internal Cross-Section
desc: Electrochemistry diagram showing Zinc outer container anode (-), central Carbon rod cathode (+), and moist paste electrolyte.

title: 14. Voltaic Galvanic Acid Cell
desc: Copper and Zinc plates immersed in dilute Sulfuric Acid electrolyte.

title: 15. Lemon Battery Science Experiment
desc: Citric acid electrolyte generating electricity across copper strip and zinc/iron nail electrodes.
